1013.issue: [W1013] Please test whether adapter can support compact mode, if not set "common.compact:false" at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.haier/blob/master/io-package.json).

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.haier/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.12.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.haier/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
